title: ARCHIVED — Speeches for 2013 — Immigration, Refugees and Citizenship Canada - Canada.ca
content:
## ARCHIVED — Speeches for 2013 — Immigration, Refugees and Citizenship Canada

## We have archived this page and will not be updating it.
You can use it for research or reference.

## We have archived this page and will not be updating it.
You can use it for research or reference.
